Describe the sequence of interface elements and text overlays visible during the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, large pink title text and a Windows taskbar are visible; at 6s, all overlays vanish revealing only the skin lesion; at 16s, white disclaimer text and a video player bar appear; at 18s, a yellow cursor arrow points directly at the mole.

question: Outline the visual changes regarding the skin lesion and overlay elements from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a dark mole with hairs appears under pink title text; at 6s, the reddish-brown lesion is shown in a clear close-up view; at 16s, the image is overlaid with white warning text; at 19s, a yellow arrow cursor indicates the specific lesion area.
